operations.summary: Get structured citations for a document version
operations.description: Returns the structured <intref>/<extref> citations extracted from the toestand XML at runner time, sliced by article scope. With ?page=N: returns refs from every article whose [startPage, endPage] range covers page N (multi-page articles surface their refs on every page they span). Without ?page: returns a summary with counts, top targets, and page coverage so the chatbot can decide follow-up scoped requests. Refs are loss-free in storage; this endpoint flattens the well-known attributes (bwbId, doc, type, label) and enriches each ref's title via a single OpenSearch lookup per response.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number; omit for summary mode

page.description: Page number (1-based) for which citations were requested

total.description: Total number of refs across all returned articles

articles.description: Articles whose page range covers the requested page

CitationsSummaryResponse.description: Citations response (summary mode, no page parameter)

totalArticles.description: Total number of article-like entries in the sidecar (articles + annexes + preamble)

totalRefs.description: Total number of refs across all articles

topTargets.description: Most-cited bwbIds with their resolved titles, descending by count

pagesWithCitations.description: Sorted list of page numbers covered by at least one article with refs

hasPreamble.description: True iff a synthetic preamble bucket (kind="preamble") with refs exists

amendmentsCount.description: Number of amendment events recorded for this timecut

CitationArticleResponse.description: An article (or annex/preamble) entry with its citations

nr.description: Article number as cited in Dutch legal practice

id.description: Article identifier (use as 'part' parameter in /text endpoint)

CitationRefResponse.description: A single intref/extref citation, flattened for chatbot consumption

bwbId.description: BWB identifier of the cited law

doc.description: Document locator within the cited law

label.description: Verbatim label text from the XML element

title.description: Title of the cited law, enriched server-side

TopTarget.description: A bwbId target with citation count and resolved title

bwbId.description: BWB identifier of the cited law

count.description: Number of citations to this bwbId

title.description: Title of the cited law, enriched server-side
